### CHAPTER 4 E+W WARRANT OF [ F24 CONTROL ]

### Applications to vary existing orders E+W


33.20. Where an application is pending for a variation of—


no warrant of [ F25 control ] may be issued to enforce payment of any sum due under those orders, except with the permission of the [ F26 court ] .


Textual Amendments


F25 Word in rule 33.20 substituted (22.4.2014) by The Family Procedure (Amendment No. 2) Rules 2014 (S.I. 2014/667) , rules 1 , 39(a) (with rule 45 )
